title: gnaphalium carniolicum
intro: Gnaphalium carniolicum, also known as Carinthian cudweed or Alpine cudweed, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves and flowers are believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestive health. Gnaphalium carniolicum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine.
